name: Texan Credit Corporation
description_short: Texan Credit Corporation is a Dallas-based installment lender founded 1999, operating branch locations across Texas. BBB B+ (not accredited). 2,408 Google reviews. Personal loans for subprime borrowers.
description_long:
Texan Credit Corporation is a consumer installment lender headquartered in Dallas, Texas, founded in 1999. The company operates multiple branch locations across Texas, providing personal installment loans primarily to subprime borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank credit. With approximately 2,408 Google reviews, Texan Credit has built a substantial local presence in the Texas consumer lending market over more than two decades.

The company offers personal installment loans with in-person service at branch locations. Like other storefront lenders targeting the subprime market, Texan Credit provides an alternative to payday loans with installment repayment structures. Pricing details including APR ranges are not publicly disclosed on their website. The company holds a BBB B+ rating but is not accredited.

As a Texas-only lender with over 20 years of operation, Texan Credit has demonstrated staying power. However, consumers should always compare loan terms against credit union personal loans, online lenders, and other installment loan providers before committing to any subprime lending product.

As a consumer lender, this company competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast approval with responses in as little as 30 minutes for online applications
Licensed and regulated by the State of Texas with A+ BBB rating
Over 75 physical branch locations across Texas for in-person support
No early payoff penalties on any Texan Credit loan
Two loan types available—signature loans and auto-secured title loans—to fit different credit situations
Flexible repayment terms built around borrower budgets
Available application methods: online, by phone, or in person
cons: Maximum loan amount of only $1,800 limits use for larger financial needs
Website does not disclose interest rates, APR, or fee structure for cost comparison
Auto-secured title loans require collateral (vehicle), carrying repossession risk
No information provided about credit score requirements or specific eligibility criteria
Signature loans require credit review, which may deny applicants with poor credit despite marketing to broad audience
best_for: Texas residents needing personal installment loans from a local branch-based lender
Consumers with limited credit seeking small-dollar loans with in-person service
Borrowers who prefer a Texas-only lender with local knowledge and community presence
diagnosis: Texan Credit Corporation has demonstrated longevity (founded 1999) and local market knowledge as a Texas-only installment lender. The BBB B+ rating is moderate. However, the lack of public pricing transparency and focus on subprime borrowers likely means elevated APRs. Compare against Sun Loan, credit union personal loans, and online lenders before borrowing.
services: Auto-secured title loans based on vehicle value
Online loan applications with 30-minute response time
Quick credit review for signature loans
Vehicle value-based lending for title loans
Local branch support and customer guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
